title: Pastry Box
description: Redeem for a mixed pastry box that feels gift-worthy and shareable. Perfect for weekend pickups and increasing family-size purchases.

title: Cookie Tin
description: A premium treat that feels special and lasts longer than a single snack. Designed to create delight and repeat visits.

title: Celebration Slice
description: A high-perceived-value reward for birthdays and special moments. Great for turning occasion shoppers into regulars.

title: Bread Bundle
description: A practical, satisfying redemption that fits everyday routines. Ideal for encouraging weekly habit purchases.

title: Seasonal Pie Slice
description: Limited-time seasonal redemption built for holiday campaigns and pre-orders. Creates urgency without discount fatigue.

title: Mini Baking Class
description: An experience reward that generates buzz and social sharing. Use it to launch seasonal products or build community.
